visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The camera pans across metal wire warehouse shelving units at a Costco, filled with numerous bags of 'CHRYSMY' brand raisin toast. The bags feature purple grape graphics. A massive 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo is superimposed in the center. (2) A close-up shot shows a hand with decorated nails reaching for and lifting a single bag of the raisin toast to inspect it. Colorful variety-show style text bubbles pop up on the screen. (3) The scene cuts to an indoor living room setting where a woman wearing a black beret and a white lace top is seated at a marble-textured table. She removes a slice of the toast from the bag, holding it up to the camera to display the distribution of raisins within the bread. (4) A quick insert shot of a price label on a shelf is shown, clearly listing the price as $95. (5) Back in the living room, the woman continues to hold the bread slice while gesturing with her hands as she speaks directly to the camera. A brown leather couch and stuffed toys are visible in the background.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 哇 客萊斯麥最新的. [Variety]: 95元開箱試吃!. [Variety]: 葡萄乾吐司. (2) [Subtitle]: 好不好吃 買來吃看看. (3) [Subtitle]: 最新出的 葡萄乾吐司. (4) [Subtitle]: 我們可以看到它的葡萄量就是 哎 這樣子 就是還可以. (5) [Subtitle]: 但它的麵包體本身我覺得比較甜. (6) [Subtitle]: 然後如果單吃的話 就會覺得 比較膩口. (7) [Subtitle]: 所以我們通常 都會把它加熱. (8) [Subtitle]: 以這個價格來說 95一條. (9) [Subtitle]: 就是你很喜歡吃 很甜吐司的人 才可以考慮. (10) [Subtitle]: 不然的話 它我覺的普通 吃起來有點普通. (11) [Subtitle]: 還是更推薦 以前的穀物那一款 歐包.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator reviewing the product.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman with dark hair, wearing a black beret and a white long-sleeved top with lace patterns.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video starts in a warehouse-style supermarket with industrial metal shelving. It then moves to a cozy indoor living room with a brown leather sofa, vertical blinds on the windows, and stuffed animals on the couch.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with an energetic, high-pitched female voice introducing the product with clear articulation. The background music is a bright, medium-tempo electronic pop track. A cartoonish 'ding' sound effect accents the introduction of the brand. (2) As the narrator describes the raisin content, the sound of crinkling plastic bags is audible in the mix. A 'pop' sound effect coincides with a visual text overlay. The music continues consistently in a major key. (3) The narrator's tone remains friendly and conversational while discussing the taste profile and price point. The vocal rhythm is steady with few pauses, and the acoustic signal is very clean with no significant background noise interference.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Observation -> Personal Review -> Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a quick and energetic consumer review of a new raisin toast product available at Costco, evaluating its price, visual quality, and sweetness for interested shoppers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed product showcase with brand name and price clearly displayed, presented as a personal recommendation/review.

high_inference.freeDescribe: Social-media native editing style with heavy use of subtitles and sound effects to maintain high engagement.
